prompt:
Subject: A witch girl standing on the boundary between a Japanese room and a manga

Person/Expression: Woman in her 20s, long dark brown hair, large red ribbon, translucent skin, natural makeup, natural healthy complexion, a slightly open-mouthed expression of light surprise, gentle eye contact with the camera.

Clothing/Pose: Deep navy one-piece dress, black short boots, a small brown bag on the back, a black cat peeking out from the bag, a broom with a red bead decoration in one hand, stepping forward with the other foot half-submerged into a torn hole in a giant manga page.

Background/Light: An elegant Japanese room with tatami mats, soft natural light streaming through shoji doors, wooden pillars and an alcove (tokonoma), a hanging scroll and a single flower in a vase, a green garden visible outside, a quiet and warm Japanese-style space.

Composition/Camera: 9:16 vertical aspect ratio, full-body portrait, slightly low angle, a large open giant manga book placed prominently in the foreground, person centered in a composition showing the boundary between manga and reality, 35mm lens, shallow depth of field, active cinematic framing.

Texture/Style: High definition, 4K quality, realistic AI portrait, natural skin texture, delicate hair flow, cinematic lighting, a fantasy expression blending live-action and manga. The manga page content consists of B&W manga panels featuring the same red-ribboned woman and black cat flying over Tokyo on a broom, including an aerial shot with Tokyo Tower, a close-up of a smile, and flight scenes. Emphasize the holes and torn paper fragments in the page, clearly expressing the sensation of a foot stepping into the manga world from reality.

Negative: Low quality, unnatural hands, collapsed face, extra fingers, distorted body, unnatural feet, broken manga panels, excessive processing, garbled text, logos, watermarks, overexposure.
